meaning: n.[闕ｯ]蝨ｰ蝪樒ｱｳ譚ｾ,豌溽ｾ取收(謚礼ｎ闕ｯ)
examples: The suppression test of low-dose dexamethasone is a dependable way for the differential diagnosis between hypernephroma and simple obesity.
Dexamethasone was excluded from these studies.
Conclusion: Dexamethasone acetate oral paste could meet the requirement of clinic.
It took a median of 76 weeks for patients taking both Thalomid and dexamethasone, an existing chemotherapy, to see their diseases worsen.
Only the corticosteroids, such as dexamethasone, and the progestational agents, such megesterol acetate, have proven of benefit in treatment of the loss of appetite.
